reasoning: Based on comprehensive historical analysis and current 2025 data, I estimate an 8% probability that Joe Biden will be the #2 searched person on Google in 2025. Historical evidence shows Biden was only #5 globally in 2024 despite being an active president/candidate during a presidential election year. The #2 position consistently goes to individuals experiencing extraordinary, sustained global events: Kate Middleton (#2 in 2024 due to cancer diagnosis) and Damar Hamlin (#1 in 2023 due to on-field cardiac arrest). As a former president, Biden maintains a low profile post-presidency, spending time on memoir writing and prostate cancer treatment - routine activities that don't generate sustained global search spikes. Competing figures like Donald Trump (returned president), Elon Musk (multiple headline-grabbing ventures), and potential surprise developments make the #2 position highly competitive. The base rate for former presidents achieving such high search rankings in non-election years is extremely low.
